title: Kanban Phone Number Additiona
excerpt:
Hi! 
The following would be a useful feature: 

When on a tile / kanban view there is not the option to add phone numbers
Our team uses this view to quickly see and contact customers instead of the main table

Thank you! …

posts.author: rax.the.ax (Rachael Axtman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

The following would be a useful feature:

  • When on a tile / kanban view there is not the option to add phone numbers
  • Our team uses this view to quickly see and contact customers instead of the main table

Thank you!
